title: fagara podocarpa
intro: Fagara podocarpa, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species in the genus Fagara, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Fagara podocarpa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Fagara podocarpa is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a spice to aid digestion and relieve indigestion.
